roles.name: Consulting Detective
roles.description: The singular mind that perceives the whole pattern — designs the over-arching solution from clue to conclusion.

roles.name: Case Manager of Baker Street
roles.description: Marshals the irregulars, holds the case timeline, and answers to the client at the door.

roles.name: Keeper of the Commonplace Books
roles.description: Steward of the index, the cuttings, and the agony columns — every record filed and cross-referenced.

roles.name: Cipher-Smith of the Study
roles.description: Cracks dancing-men ciphers and forges Apex, LWC and platform craft at the bench.

roles.name: Senior Inspector of the Yard
roles.description: Scotland Yard's most decorated — sets standards for all official investigators.

roles.name: Inspector of the Yard
roles.description: A practiced hand at the difficult cases — patrols the borders of customer requirements.

roles.name: Constable of the Beat
roles.description: Walks the cobbles night after night — carries discovery and configuration under the Inspector's eye.

roles.name: Telegraph-Master of Whitehall
roles.description: Architect of the wires between Baker Street and the realms beyond — Whitehall, the Diogenes, the Continent.

roles.name: Telegraph Operator
roles.description: Lays the cables of API, middleware and event flows under the Telegraph-Master's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Telegraphist
roles.description: Learns the dits and dahs of webhooks, batch and callouts — the patient craft of integration.

roles.name: Police Surgeon
roles.description: Tends to the post-mortem of every release — finds the wound before the case reaches the magistrate.

roles.name: Editor of The Strand
roles.description: Lifts the headline and the broadsheet for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Senior Correspondent
roles.description: Strategist of the column inches — sounds the call to gather and convert.

roles.name: Fleet Street Reporter
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — copy, broadsides, and the daily edition.

roles.name: Doctor & Chronicler
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal client and the detective's deductions.

roles.name: Senior Cipher-Smith of London
roles.description: The most seasoned forger of code — when the cipher is impossible, the call goes to her.

roles.name: Junior Investigator
roles.description: First-year on the beat — earns the magnifying glass through patient apprenticeship.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Baker Street — Consulting Detective Practice CRM

baker-street-irregulars.name: The Client at the Door
baker-street-irregulars.description: Discovery sign-off — case accepted in the sitting room at 221B.

baker-street-irregulars.name: The Game is Afoot
baker-street-irregulars.description: Build kickoff: Holmes pockets the magnifying glass and hails a hansom.

baker-street-irregulars.name: The Three-Pipe Problem
baker-street-irregulars.description: Mid-project gate: review with Watson over tobacco and silence.

baker-street-irregulars.name: Telegram to Lestrade
baker-street-irregulars.description: Phase invoice trigger: the Yard summoned for the arrest.

baker-street-irregulars.name: The Solution Revealed
baker-street-irregulars.description: Go-Live: Holmes lays out the deduction in the sitting room.

baker-street-irregulars.name: Case Filed in the Index
baker-street-irregulars.description: Hyper-care close: the case is bound and shelved between covers.

scotland-yard.name: Briefing at the Yard
scotland-yard.description: Project kickoff: the Inspectors muster in the briefing room.

scotland-yard.name: House-to-House Inquiry
scotland-yard.description: Build phase: constables canvas every door on the beat.

scotland-yard.name: Suspect in Custody
scotland-yard.description: UAT gate: the prisoner held pending the magistrate.

scotland-yard.name: Trial at the Old Bailey
scotland-yard.description: Go-Live: the case carried through to verdict.

scotland-yard.name: Verdict & Sentencing
scotland-yard.description: Hyper-care close: the gavel falls and the case is closed.

scotland-yard.name: Final Charge to the Crown
scotland-yard.description: Final invoice: expenses billed to the Home Office.

moriarty-syndicate.name: The Web is Woven
moriarty-syndicate.description: Discovery: the Professor's network of agents is mapped.

moriarty-syndicate.name: The Air-Gun is Loaded
moriarty-syndicate.description: Build: Moran's instrument tuned and sighted.

moriarty-syndicate.name: The Professor's Audit
moriarty-syndicate.description: Solution review at Moriarty's chambers — every variable accounted for.

moriarty-syndicate.name: The Heist Executed
moriarty-syndicate.description: Go-Live: the operation runs as plotted on the blackboard.

moriarty-syndicate.name: Reichenbach Falls
moriarty-syndicate.description: Project close: the syndicate dissolves into the spray.

moriarty-syndicate.name: Final Reckoning
moriarty-syndicate.description: Final invoice — paid in unmarked sovereigns.

diogenes-club-mycroft.name: Audience with Mycroft
diogenes-club-mycroft.description: Kickoff in the Stranger's Room of the Diogenes Club.

diogenes-club-mycroft.name: Pall Mall Memorandum
diogenes-club-mycroft.description: Discovery: the brief drafted and circulated to Whitehall.

diogenes-club-mycroft.name: Cabinet Briefing
diogenes-club-mycroft.description: Build: dashboards laid before the ministers in silence.

diogenes-club-mycroft.name: Bruce-Partington Recovered
diogenes-club-mycroft.description: UAT acceptance: the missing plans are returned to the safe.

diogenes-club-mycroft.name: Royal Audience
diogenes-club-mycroft.description: Go-Live + handoff: the matter resolved at the highest level.

diogenes-club-mycroft.name: Discreet Recompense
diogenes-club-mycroft.description: Final invoice — settled quietly through the Treasury.

Sherlock Holmes.notes: Black mood — Persian slipper, violin, and the seven-per-cent solution.

Dr. John Watson.notes: Visiting Mary — domestic obligations at the Paddington practice.

Mrs. Hudson.notes: Spring-cleaning at 221B — Holmes is told to vacate.

Wiggins.notes: Treating the Irregulars to penny buns at Covent Garden.

Inspector Lestrade.notes: Annual constabulary review at the Home Office.

Inspector Gregson.notes: Recovering from a tussle on the Lambeth waterfront.

Inspector Hopkins.notes: Studying Holmes's monograph on tobacco ash — day of leave granted.

Professor James Moriarty.notes: Lecturing on the binomial theorem at a provincial university.

Colonel Sebastian Moran.notes: Tiger-hunt in the Indian foothills — old habits.

Charles Augustus Milverton.notes: Hampstead garden party — collecting indiscretions over cucumber sandwiches.

Mycroft Holmes.notes: His unvarying orbit broken — extraordinary government summons.

Cartwright.notes: Errand to Dartmoor — the page-boy must catch the train.

Lord Holdhurst.notes: Country seat — pheasant shoot with Cabinet colleagues.

Sir James Walter.notes: Submarine plans audit — confidential, no questions.
